calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-31-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Appearances: Christopher Sean Vuksinich, petitioner in pro per,is sworn and examined. The Court grants the petition for change of name to Michael Sean Vuksinich. Order signed in open court. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: R.Goulding; Reporter A. Duffy CSR# 12599;
